channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: The 9 best tools to build a Second Brain as a developer in 2025
item.description: Cut Second Brain setup time by 60% with Logseq and Git-native tools — plain text, offline search under 0.1s, and a $5/month VPS tier for freelancers and startups

item.title: Free AI Tools That Professionals Actually Use: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Free AI Tools That Professionals Actually Use failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a…

item.title: Automate Your Daily Dev Tasks in 60 Lines of Python
item.description: Automate 45-minute dev tasks in 2 minutes with 60 lines of Python — real benchmarks, CLI flags, and the mistakes that break scripts across teams

item.title: No-code AI data analysis crashes when loading CSV files over 10MB
item.description: Fix silent CSV upload failures with no-code AI tools in under 5 minutes. Stop guessing why 15 MB files fail while 1 MB ones work. Includes Google Drive bypass, Nginx tuning, and chunking scripts for bootstrappers and enterprises.

item.title: Why Figma kept growing when Adobe tried to buy it
item.description: Learn how Figma survived Adobe’s $20B buyout by building a web-first, CRDT-powered design tool with built-in GDPR compliance—cutting onboarding time from hours to minutes and enabling 50 designers on one file.

item.title: The 7 Best Multi-Modal AI Tools in 2024
item.description: Discover the 7 best multi-modal AI tools in 2024. Compare performance, cost, and use cases to find the perfect fit for your project needs.

item.title: 2026 Full-Stack Stack: 40% faster dev cycles with 3x uptime
item.description: es and 99.7% uptime—acceptable for a 2022 with Full-Stack Stack faster dev — weeks of compliance engineering.

item.title: AI skills that paid off: how we built a 6-figure pipeline in 12 months
item.description: Cut model deployment time by 75% and costs by 65% with a hybrid AI pipeline — the real AI skills for 2026 and the tools that made the difference.

item.title: How TypeScript snuck 20% more features into the same sprint
item.description: Cut runtime errors by 94% and boost integration velocity by 89% using TypeScript contracts that define both types and schemas. Includes benchmarks, code examples, and a 312-line codegen tool to sync compile-time and runtime safety.

item.title: API at 1M RPM with $200/month: The stack we chose
item.description: Built an API that handled 1 million requests per minute on a $200 budget using FastAPI, Redis Streams, and SQLite. Cut latency by 90% and saved 14% on costs with a queue-first architecture.

item.title: IoT Architecture Explained at Last
item.description: Cut cloud egress costs by 72% and device bricking by 90% with a real IoT architecture — LoRaWAN, MQTT, TimescaleDB, and the mistakes that brick devices during firmware updates.

item.title: Earn with AI Tools: Build vs Buy AI Agents
item.description: Cut monthly AI costs by 80% with custom agents vs hosted platforms. Choose FastAPI + LiteLLM for scale or Voiceflow for speed using real latency, cost, and engineering benchmarks.

item.title: How we halved API latency with Big O analysis
item.description: Cut API latency by 55x using Big O analysis — reduced median response time from 2.1s to 38ms, saved $60/month, and fixed Black Friday traffic spikes with RedisSearch and NumPy vectorization.

item.title: Push Notifications Are a Security Hole Unless You Do This
item.description: Cut FCM/APNs costs by 65% and eliminate PII leakage in push notifications by never sending user data in payloads — design a secure remote execution channel with per-user encryption keys and token rotation. Push notifications security guide for fintech and healthtech apps.

item.title: Write Bash Scripts Without Wanting to Die (2024)
item.description: A ranked list of 8 ways to automate tasks with Bash—tested on 2,847 CSV files across Cape Town, Tallinn, and Manila—with code, benchmarks, and the one option most solo founders should pick first.

item.title: AI Agents Fail Unless You Treat Them Like Bad Hires
item.description: Why most AI agents fail in production, with real examples, cost figures, and a checklist to build reliable systems from day one.

item.title: Why ‘Everyone Should Learn to Code’ is a lie (and the truth)
item.description: How a $22 VM served 10,000 RPM and why the ‘learn to code’ mantra ignores the hidden cost of production.

item.title: Tech Interview Red Flags vs Green Lights: What Actually Gets You Hired
item.description: Option B cuts false positives by 60% and speeds up hiring by 50%—here’s the data and the repo template to replicate it.

item.title: How Linear, GitLab & Bolt Cut 4-Day Weeks Without Crashing Production
item.description: Linear, GitLab & Bolt cut workweeks without crashing production. Real code, benchmarks, and failure modes from a Berlin-to-Lagos stack.

item.title: Mental Models for Developers — Finally Explained
item.description: How five mental models—queueing theory, negative feedback, opportunity cost, Pareto, and amortized analysis—turn reactive firefighting into proactive system design, with real benchmarks and fixes.
